data.label: MTDataFilesProvider
data.description: 为您自己开发的应用快速注入 MT 的文件提供器，无需 ROOT 即可在手机上管理此应用的私有目录文件。

data.label: MTDataFilesProvider
data.description: Quickly inject the MT file provider into your self-developed application, allowing you to manage the app's private directory files on the phone without ROOT access.
